title: The Kaworu Katsuragi Connection
wikitext:
[]: The Kaworu-Katsuragi Connection?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 01, 2006 1:45 am (If you know me, you probably have a good idea of what this will be about. Apparently, it would be a good idea if I just got it out of the way. Well, I'll try...) One of the things for which I'm infamous is the advocation of the following: Yui : Rei :: Dr. Katsuragi : Kaworu The basic idea gets far more rolling eyes than it deserves, in my opinion, since, at a barebones level, it rather intuitively satisfies a gap where numerous preestablished patterns of correlations converge. (See e.g. here .) The problem is that, as with so much else in NGE, there is no way to empirically prove it OR deny it, only weigh its probability. I've noticed a handful of items in the show that may be, rather subtly, suggesting ties between Kaworu and the three members of one particular "character family": Misato, Dr. Katsuragi, and Kaji. Here I'll attempt to present observations of possible relevance, while posing questions and making suggestions along the way. RULE: I'll be happy to get this over with. You can help me out by not interjecting with your doubts , or whatever, until at least all of Exhibit A is up. You'll know when the green light goes on. ***** EXHIBIT A: Misato & Kaworu In episode #24, Misato takes an acute interest in "that boy" early on, her suspicions piqued before she even sees him in the flesh. Just to set the stage, I'll start things off with some generic copypasta. After Asuka is recovered, Misato thinks to herself... Misato (MONO): And today, Asuka's replacement, the Fifth Child, arrives. Everything is just too perfect.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 01, 2006 1:52 am And now, onto our first major scene. SCENE 1 #24: The Monoliths of the Lake Here, we see Kaworu talking to... ...absolutely nobody at all. And he's being watched from afar. Misato: It's no good. I can't read his lips from here. But he certainly is a shady character, going out for a walk so early in the morning to talk to himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Fri Sep 01, 2006 3:18 am Woah woah woah woah woah woah woah. How is he standing on a petrified MP Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Sep 01, 2006 6:38 am Mundane wrote: Woah woah woah woah woah woah woah. How is he standing on a petrified MP Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 01, 2006 8:47 am Reichu wrote: RULE: I'll be happy to get this over with. You can help me out by not interjecting with your doubts, or whatever, until at least all of Exhibit A is up. You'll know when the green light goes on.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Sep 01, 2006 10:28 am Mundane wrote: Woah woah woah woah woah woah woah. How is he standing on a petrified MP Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by SaeculiTerminus » Fri Sep 01, 2006 10:38 am the first time I saw that thing, I thought it was the dead body of EVA-00 >.>

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Sep 01, 2006 10:49 am Shin-seiki wrote: Mundane wrote: Woah woah woah woah woah woah woah. How is he standing on a petrified MP Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Sep 01, 2006 11:44 am Shin-seiki wrote: One could ask what the statue is doing out in the middle of the lake in this scene, tho... or, for that matter, how Kaworu got out there..

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Sep 01, 2006 7:10 pm Shinji was there thinking...he didnt notice Kawarou until he started singing... i think the statue is probly just that...a statue...not a harpy...just a statue of what most think an angel looks like...but its pretty obvious why its there...the statue is headless...its an angel statue...after Kawarou gets his head popped off...satue is shown while Misato and Shinji speak...in Death and Rebirth after hes decapitated the statue bleeds at the neck... its pretty obvious...Statue represents Kawrou...and if you ever wanted to draw what you think Tabris looks like in angel form...thats probly what to look at...(some theorize that hed look like a Harpy...but its only cuz of the dummy plug)

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Fri Sep 01, 2006 8:29 pm I placed a bet with myself last night before going to bed based on how long it would take before someone would skip Reichu's "don't post yet" message and post a disparaging comment. I won the bet.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Fri Sep 01, 2006 8:37 pm Good for you ! If she had a picture of Asuka's gravestone, would've asked about that one to.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 01, 2006 9:22 pm zeaven wrote: I placed a bet with myself last night before going to bed based on how long it would take before someone would skip Reichu's "don't post yet" message and post a disparaging comment.

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Sat Sep 02, 2006 10:19 am Well, I am interested....there are many things to cover and this was just the beginning. I'm all ears...err...eyes lol (you know what I mean)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 02, 2006 10:54 am SCENE 2 #24: The Escalator RANDOM OBSERVER: Wait wait wait... I thought this was "Misato and Kaworu", not "Rei and Kaworu".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 02, 2006 11:36 am SCENE 3 #24: Musings That evening â€“ whilst various other characters are talking to Evas, making farewells to penguins, and having intimate sleepovers â€“ Rei contemplates in a most economic manner, drawing (almost) entirely from the banks of prior episodes. Rei: Why am I here? Why am I alive again? For what? And for whom? The Fifth Children... That boy... I feel as if he's the same as me. Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 02, 2006 1:00 pm SCENE 4 #24: The Bridge Early the next morning, after Misato's experience at Lake Tokyo-3, she meets up with Hyuga-kun again. Misato (OFF): How did it go? Did you get any data on him? HYUGA: Here it is. I borrowed it from First Lieutenant Ibuki without her permission. Misato: I'm sorry I keep making you do these theft-like things. What is this?! HYUGA: It's no wonder Maya can't release this information. It's all theoretically impossible data. Misato: You're right. It only deepens the mystery. To think that he can freely set his synch rate with the Eva... And of his own will at that. I guess this is yet again no time to be worried about appearances.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Sep 02, 2006 3:42 pm Reichu wrote: There seems to be an unusual 'weariness' to Misato in this scene.

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Sat Sep 02, 2006 3:44 pm If it helps any, that last line is translated as "I guess it's time to go maverick again." in the dubs. So yeah, you're correct. I also noticed a similarity between the way Misato's eyes and Rei's eyes diverge in those two scenes. Just a coincidence, of course. I'm only playing devil's advocate here, you know. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 02, 2006 11:19 pm zeaven wrote: If it helps any, that last line is translated as "I guess it's time to go maverick again." in the dubs. So yeah, you're correct.
